summary: Comprehensive testing of the new Student Progress Dashboard feature. All 26 backend tests passed (16 existing + 10 new progress tests). Frontend UI tests verified all components render correctly with proper empty states.

issues: Recharts console warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - charts still render correctly but may have momentary rendering delay

critical_code_review_comments: Progress endpoint correctly requires guardian authentication and validates ownership
Empty states render correctly for all sections when student has no activity
Recharts pie chart renders properly with vocabulary mastery data
All stat cards (Words Mastered, Reading Time, Avg WPM, Assessments) display correct data structure
Back button navigation works correctly between student selection and detail view
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed guardians and students created during testing for auth validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student Progress Dashboard feature fully tested. The test student 'PinTest Kid' has no narratives, assessments, or read_logs - all empty states are rendering correctly. Backend progress endpoint at GET /api/students/{id}/progress returns aggregated data correctly. recharts library working for pie charts.

backend_api_tests: Progress returns correct top-level structure (student, reading_stats, vocabulary, assessments, narratives, assigned_banks)
Student data structure in progress response validated
Reading stats structure validated (total_reading_seconds, total_words_read, average_wpm, sessions_count)
Vocabulary structure validated (mastered_count, biological_target, mastery_percentage, recent_mastered)
Assessments structure validated (total, completed, average_accuracy, history)
Empty states return correct zero values for fresh students
frontend_ui_tests: Progress tab renders student selection view
Student cards display with View Progress button
View Progress navigates to detailed progress view
Back button returns to student selection
All 4 stat cards render (Words Mastered, Reading Time, Avg WPM, Assessments)
Vocabulary Mastery section with pie chart renders
Assessment History section renders with empty state
Story History section renders with empty state
Assigned Word Banks section renders with empty message
Character Education section renders with empty message

components_verified: Assessment history bar chart placeholder (empty state)
